Schools (—)

Browse and manage all registered school institutions

Staff (—)

HR records, staff profiles, and role management

Announcements (—)

Post and manage network-wide announcements

Survey Console (—)

Create and share surveys to Academic Hub and Teachers Hub

Message Board (—)

Forum discussions across all departments

Documents (—)

Shared files, policies, and official documents

Activities (—)

Track tasks, projects, and ongoing activities across the network

Certificates (—)

Track workshop certificates, recipients, and certificate numbers

Weekly Checklist

Your weekly tasks and essentials — director and coordinator views

Message Board →

Management Modules

Appraisals

Manage staff performance evaluations, set objectives, and track appraisal cycles across all schools in the network.

Open module

Academics

Oversee curriculum standards, academic programmes, learning outcomes, and cross-school academic alignment.

Open module

Assessments

Plan network-wide assessments, analyse results, benchmark performance, and generate reports across schools.

Open module

KPI & Performance

Track key performance indicators and monitor school performance metrics across the network.

Open module

Reports & Export

Generate network-wide reports — pacing, checklists, survey response rates, and announcement read receipts. CSV export.

Open module

School Visits & Audits

Schedule visits, record outcomes and action items, and run Cambridge quality audit checklists across partner schools.

Open module

Mail Composer

Send newsletters and announcements to teachers across all schools. Rich editor, school filter, campaign history.

Open module
